case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. FRANCES ALLEN

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN, FRANCES $3,655.12 PRINCIPAL, $264.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,919.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: 1.INTEREST, 2.COSTS (CCP 1033), 3.ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO THE UNJUST ENRICHMENT CLAIM AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, FRANCES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-24-2011
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $264.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, FRANCES
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. SERVED AUG-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, FRANCES
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100012150) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, FRANCES
